Toolbar can be customized to only enable the desired plugins based on the ToolbarItemConfig model (see code source for example). Translated localized labels can also be used for custom tooltip messages as well as extra options property to enable sub-features.

isMinimalToolbar=true option can be added to the eui-editor tag to enable a minimal set of predefined plugins.
List of available plugins
Name Label (tooltip) & options isMinimalToolbar
headings Style - Apply an HTML tag or CSS class to the selected text
options: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 to enable h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 headings
font Font - Change the font face
bold Bold (Ctrl + B) - Make the selected text bold
italic Italic (Ctrl + I) - Italicize the selected text
underline Underline (Ctrl + U) - Underline the selected text
strike Strikethrough - Draw a line to the middle of the selected text
fontColor Font Color - Change the text color
fontBackground Font Background - Change the text background color
subscript Subscript - Create ssmall letters below the text baseline
superscript Superscript - Create small letters above the line of the text
textAlign Text Align - Align the text to the selected position: left (default), center, right or justify
orderedList Numbering - Start an ordered list
bulletList Bullets - Start a bulleted list
indentLess Decrease Indent - Decrease the indent level of the paragraph
indentMore Increase Indent - Increase the indent level of the paragraph
blockquote Blockquote - Create a quoted block of the selected text
codeBlock Insert Code Block - Insert a code block at the cursor row position
link Insert Hyperlink (Ctrl + K) - Create a link to a Web page, a picture, an e-mail address or a program
image Insert Picture - Insert a picture from a file
imageUrl Insert Picture from URL - Insert a picture from a remote URL
option: dialogMessage ('Enter image link URL')
video Insert Video - Insert a video from a file
table Insert Table - Inserts a 3x3 rows/cols table
clean Remove Styles - Remove the styles of the selected text
delete Delete content - Permanently deletes editor\'s contents
undo Undo (Ctrl + Z) - Cancels the previous action
redo Redo (Ctrl + Y) - Do the next history action again
counters Counters - Characters and words counters (stripped Html)
options: characters, words
Interactive toggle — isReadOnly = {{ isReadOnly }}
Custom toolbar
With isMinimalToolbar=true option
Custom using the euiEditorCustomToolbar content directive (toolbar HTML structure)

The euiEditorCustomToolbar content directive offers the most customizable and flexible way of building a custom toolbar with almost all the available extra features we have added like undo & redo, counters display, tooltips, etc.

Undo & Redo custom buttons uses the QuillEditor instance's history module which can be accessible by getting it from onEditorCreated (deprecated) or editorCreate event emitter.

Also for characters and words counters you can use the eui-editor-counters component and pass the input values of your own (custom function) or use the EuiEditor default calculated values coming from getCharactersCounter (deprecated) or charactersCountChange and getWordsCounter (deprecated) or wordsCountChange events emitters.

See code source for more information.

The following sample is using the euiTooltip directive to display the tooltip text. See the code source and the euiTooltip for more information.
